form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a sixth (19.99) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Suited here and sure to go close fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a sixth (19.99) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Suited here and sure to go close fresh.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 7 length seventh (16.48) at Launceston. Previous form sound including a win three back at Launceston. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (19.59) over 340m at this track. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 278m at Launceston. Others better.

formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 278m at Launceston. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped and was checked; Raced wide.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 461m in 25.84. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 461m at this track at Free For All level. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Dominant winner to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Launceston, recording a brilliant 16.01 over the 278m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (16.23) when fourth over 278m at Launceston in a Other. Has one success and four minors from eight starts from box 7. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.66. Followed that up with a minor placing over 340m at this track at Grade 6 three-and-a-half weeks ago. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 340m at this track behind Black Mouse, beaten 8 lengths (19.82). Would be better placed in something easier.
